explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to texts describing natural disasters, accidents, or emergency situations (such as earthquakes, volcanic eruptions, building collapses, floods, or seismic activity).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across multiple languages (Spanish, Italian, English, Arabic, Russian, Bengali, etc.) and typically in news reports or factual descriptions of catastrophic events. Topics include geological disasters (earthquakes, volcanic eruptions), weather-related disasters (floods, droughts), and human-made emergencies (terrorist attacks, building collapses). The texts often contain specific details like locations, magnitudes, official responses, or damage reports, indicating a focus on real-world adverse events.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: The high-activation texts consistently mention actual or potential harm, damage, or danger from disasters or emergencies, often with a sense of urgency or factual reporting. The low-activation texts cover routine news, entertainment, technology, sports, and everyday topics without any reference to disasters or emergencies. The key distinction is the presence of a negative, destructive event that poses a threat to people or property, which is absent in the low-activation group.

4. **Closing interpretation**: This neuron detects semantic content related to disasters and emergencies, likely serving as a feature for identifying and categorizing texts about catastrophic events. It responds to a broad range of such events across different languages and contexts, acting as a disaster/emergency detector in the model's representation.

results.actual_text: velmi vysokou kvalitu spektroskopických měření a použití sofistikovaných metod jak při jej
results.plain_text: Praha - Mezinárodní vědecký tým vedený Petrem Kabáthem z Astronomického ústavu Akademie věd ČR (ASÚ AV ČR) objevil stopy atomárního sodíku u dvou exoplanet, což jsou planety, které obíhají kolem jiné hvězdy než kolem Slunce. Ústav o tom informoval v tiskové zprávě. Sodík byl nalezen u planet typu horký Jupiter - WASP-76b a horký Neptun - WASP-127b, u KELT-11b a WASP-166b nikoli. U planety WASP-76b byl sodík detekován i týmem švýcarských vědců, ovšem jinou metodou.  Exoplanet obíhajících kolem vzdálených hvězd astronomové znají zhruba 4000, pouze malá část z nich má ale potvrzenu přítomnost atmosféry. "Pozorování stopy exoplanetární atmosféry vyžaduje velmi vysokou kvalitu spektroskopických měření a použití sofistikovaných metod jak při jejich zpracování, tak také při jejich analýze," uvedl ústav. Na objevu se podíleli vědci z ASÚ AV ČR, Masarykovy univerzity v Brně a Evropské jižní observatoře, jejich článek vydal americký časopis The Astronomical Journal.  "Tento objev je významný tím, že charakterizace exoatmosfér je relativně na počátku. Teprve od mise NASA TESS a později ESA PLATO (ČR je členem v PLATO) si slibujeme další dobré kandidáty na charakterizaci exoatmosfér. Proto je dobře, abychom byli připraveni," napsal ČTK Kabáth. Mise ESA PLATO má podle Českého kosmického portálu za cíl vyhledat a studovat exoplanetární systémy, v nichž by měla vyhledávat planety velikosti Země v obyvatelné zóně kolem mateřských hvězd. Zahájena bude v roce 2026.  "Je to krok k pochopení složení exoplanetárních atmosfér a ukázka toho, že exoatmosféry mají různé složení. Některé sodík mají, některé ne," dodal Kabáth. Nenalezení sodíku u dvou exoplanet může znamenat, že prvek v atmosféře planety chybí, případně se vyskytuje jen v malém nepozorovatelném množství, nebo to může být zapříčiněno přítomností mraků nebo částic prachu, které nepropouští žádnou informaci o složení spodních vrstev atmosféry.  "Obecně lze prvky obsažené v atmosféře exoplanety detekovat pomocí spektroskopických pozorování, a to srovnáním spekter během probíhajícího zákrytu hvězdy planetou, chvíli před ním a po něm," uvedl Jiří Žák z Masarykovy univerzity. "Protože atmosféra exoplanety zanechá ve spektru jen velmi nepatrný otisk, je zachycení takovéto stopy extrémně složité a je zapotřebí velkých dalekohledů s přesnými spektrografy, důmyslných metod a pečlivé práce," dodal.  Horkými Jupitery se nazývají exoplanety, které mají zároveň plynné atmosféry podobně jako Jupiter, ale s vyšší teplotou. "Tento typ planet má atmosféry složené převážně z vodíku a hélia, ale někdy se v nich vyskytují také stopy jiných prvků jako například draslíku, vápníku a atomárního sodíku," přiblížil ústav.

predictions.text: Nenalezení sodíku u dvou exoplanet může znamenat, že prvek v atmosféře planety chybí, případně se vyskytuje jen v malém nepozorovatelném množství, nebo to může být zapříčiněno přítomností mraků nebo částic prachu, které nepropouští žádnou informaci o složení spodních vrstev atmosféry.
predictions.reasoning: Mentions clouds or dust particles that obscure atmospheric composition, which could be loosely associated with natural phenomena but not a disaster.

results.actual_text: avaa päätöstä tehnyt, vaan kaikki hakemukset käsitellään tapaus kerrallaan. Säännö
results.plain_text: Asiasta kertoi ensinnähttps://inbeijing.se/bulletin/2019/03/17/sweden-now-grants-refugee-status-to-all-uyghurs-from-xinjiang/ Kiinaan erikoistunut, vapaa ruotsalaistoimittaja Jojje Olssonhttps://www.hs.fi/haku/?query=jojje+olsson, joka asuu nykyisin Taiwanissa. Maahanmuuttovirasto on päivännyt uuden linjauksensa jo tammikuussa, ja Olssonin mukaan sitä on ryhdytty toteuttamaan maaliskuussa. Viraston virkaa tekevä lakijohtaja Carl Bexeliushttps://www.hs.fi/haku/?query=carl+bexelius kommentoi Ruotsin radiollehttps://sverigesradio.se/artikel/7179213https://sverigesradio.se/artikel/7179213, että Xinjiangissa harjoitetaan ”aika pitkälle menevää valtiollista vainoa”, jossa ihmisiä pidätetään ja vangitaan ilman varsinaisia rikossyytteitä. Ruotsin maahanmuuttoviraston päätös korvaa edellisen linjauksen, joka tehtiin 2013. Uiguurien karkotukset keskeytettiin jo viime syyskuussa. Uudessa päätöksessä arvioidaan, että vaino voi kohdistua myös muihin turkinsukuisiin vähemmistökansallisuuksiin ja ylipäätään muslimeihin. Suomen maahanmuuttovirasto ei turvapaikkayksikön johtajan Esko Revonhttps://www.hs.fi/haku/?query=esko+revon mukaan ole vastaavaa päätöstä tehnyt, vaan kaikki hakemukset käsitellään tapaus kerrallaan. Säännölliset turvallisuusarviot tehdään Suomessa suurista pakolaisten alkuperämaista eli Irakista, Afganistanista ja Somaliasta. Muiden maiden tilannetta arvioidaan tarpeen mukaan. ”Faktatieto on, että uiguureita kohdellaan Xinjiangissa siten, että siellä mitä ilmeisemmin oikeudellisia loukkauksia esiintyy”, Repo arvioi. Lue lisää: HS:n erikoisartikkeli vie Kiinan uiguurialueelle, missä historian käsittämättömin kontrollikoneisto aivopesee ihmisiä ja ahdistelee toimittajaa joka askeleellahttps://dynamic.hs.fi/2019/uiguurimuslimit/?_ga=2.69324114.376720506.1553314280-1367529095.1537791711 Maahanmuuttovirasto ei tilastoi turvapaikanhakijoita kansallisuuden tai uskonnon mukaan. Ylipäätään Kiinasta pakolaisia tulee vähän: alkuvuonna Suomesta on turvapaikkaa hakenut kolme Kiinan kansalaista. Häntäpäässä he ovat Ruotsinkin tilastoissa, joihin kirjattiin koko viime vuoden aikana 45 kiinalaista turvapaikanhakijaa. Kiinan valtiollinen, englanninkielinen iltapäivälehti Global Times http://www.globaltimes.cn/content/1143053.shtmlennätti viikonvaihteen pääkirjoituksessaan tyrmistelemään Ruotsin linjanvetoa. Kirjoitus muistutti viime syksyn kohusta, joka syntyi poliisin poistettua kolme kiinalaisturistia tukholmalaisesta hotellista, johon heillä ei ollut huonevarausta. ”Tämän saman maan poliisi työnsi kaksi kiinalaisvanhusta viime talvena hyiseen lähiön yöhön ja nyt tämä kansa osoittaa sympatiaa”, pääkirjoitus vertasi. Lehti muistutti Kiinan päästäneen ”ainakin kaksi” toimittajaa Xinjiangin ”uudelleenkoulutusleireille”, mikä on pääkirjoittajan mukaan osoitus ”Kiinan jalomielisyydestä ja hyvästä itsetunnosta”. Euroopan unionin Kiinan-edustusto kertoi maanantaina Kiinan hallituksen kutsuneen kaikki EU-maiden suurlähettiläät tutustumaan Xinjiangin tilanteeseen keskiviikkona ja torstaina. EU-edustusto vastasi uutistoimisto Reutersin mukaan, että asia on tärkeä mutta aikataulu liian kiireinen. Kiina Seuraa Maahanmuutto Seuraa Ruotsi Seuraa Turvapaikanhakijat Seuraa Pekka Hakala Seuraa

results.actual_text: am challenging him—he can try.” Pabillo is the chair of the Catholic Bishops’ Conference of the Philippines’ Episcopal Commission on the Laity. Mr
results.plain_text: Just try, bishop dares Duterte on threat to kill rights advocates  A Catholic bishop has challenged President Duterte to make good on his threat to kill human rights advocates who are critical of his bloody war on illegal drugs.  Manila auxiliary bishop Broderick Pabillo dared the President to try and take down his critics, including members of the clergy who have slammed the government for the rising deaths.  “The culture of impunity in the name of the drug war would not spare anyone,” Pabillo said. “The human rights activists, lawyers and political enemies would be included and termed as drug coddlers. I am challenging him—he can try.” Pabillo is the chair of the Catholic Bishops’ Conference of the Philippines’ Episcopal Commission on the Laity.  Mr. Duterte had earlier threatened to kill human rights activists who criticize his war on illegal drugs, which has taken almost 6,000 lives.  “In the Church, we don’t let ourselves be cowed by fear. We are on the side of the truth. Part of the Church’s history is martyrdom, that is happening until now,” he said.  He added that the Church would continue to encourage more people to speak up against extrajudicial killings.  “People should not keep quiet because of fear. Now is the time to speak out,” he said.

predictions.text: Mr. Duterte had earlier threatened to kill human rights activists who criticize his war on illegal drugs, which has taken almost 6,000 lives.
predictions.reasoning: Directly mentions the threat to kill human rights activists and the death toll of 6,000, which is a violent emergency.

results.actual_text: Here’s the 2022 Super Bowl Halftime Show Setlist It was
results.plain_text: Here’s the 2022 Super Bowl Halftime Show Setlist It was California love at the 2022 Super Bowl event. Dr. Dre, Snoop Dogg, Eminem, Kendrick Lamar and Mary J. Blige delivered an electrifying performance at the Pepsi Super Bowl LVI halftime show at the SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, Calif., on Sunday night (Feb. 13). The powerhouse event marked the first time the five artists have performed on stage together. According to the NFL, Dre, Snoop, Em, Kendrick and Mary have released a total of 22 No. 1 Billboard albums and have won 44 combined Grammy Awards. K-Dot is probably the first Pulitzer-Prize winning artist to ever grace the Super Bowl halftime stage. Statistics aside, the five mega artists formed like Voltron and presented an unforgettable performance. All eyes were on Snoop as he kicked off things with a PG-rated version of his classic hit, "The Next Episode." Next, the Doggfather was joined by the D-R-E for a rendition of "California Love." 50 Cent followed with a surprise appearance and performed his 2003 banger "In Da Club." Fif’s performance then segued into Mary J. Blige’s energetic set. The Queen of Hip-Hop Soul sang her 2001 anthemic hit “Family Affair,” which Dr. Dre produced and became the R&B singer’s first No. 1 hit single on the Billboard Hot 100 chart. The R&B singer then followed that up with an emotional performance of "No More Drama." K-Dot then graced the field and delivered a fantastic performance of his song "Alright," preluded with "m.A.A.d. City." The Compton rhymer’s set was the most anticipated since he’s been out of the spotlight for nearly half a decade. It’s always good to see him back and rocking the mic. The Detroit rhymer ended his set by taking a knee on stage in honor of Colin Kaepernick, the former San Francisco 49ers player who began kneeling in 2016 as a sign of protest to bring attention to the police brutality and racial inequality that Black men and women face in their daily lives. Em stayed on one knee as Dr. Dre sat at the piano and play the melody of Tupac Shakur's "I Ain't Mad at Cha" on the ivory keys. It was a cool yet subliminal tribute to the late rapper. Finally, Dre and Snoop finished their halftime performance with a rousing performance of "Still D.R.E." At the end, Dre, Snoop, 50, Mary, Kendrick and Em stood in the middle of the stage to receive the roaring applause from fans in attendance at SoFi Stadium. It was definitely Dre’s day at Super Bowl LVI. Check out the 2022 Super Bowl halftime show setlist below. 1. "The Next Episode" - Snoop Dogg 2. "California Love" - Dr. Dre 3. "In Da Club" - 50 Cent 4. "Family Affair" - Mary J. Blige 5. "No More Drama" - Mary J. Blige 6. "M.a.a.D City" - Kendrick Lamar 7. "Alright" - Kendrick Lamar 8. "Forgot About Dre" - Kendrick Lamar, Eminem and Dr. Dre 9. "Lose Yourself" - Eminem 10. "I Ain’t Mad at Cha" - Tupac Shakur, performed by Dr. Dre 11. "Still D.R.E." - Dr. Dre with Snoop Dogg, Mary J. Blige, 50 Cent, Kendrick Lamar and Eminem Watch the Super Bowl halftime show below.

predictions.text: The Detroit rhymer ended his set by taking a knee on stage in honor of Colin Kaepernick, the former San Francisco 49ers player who began kneeling in 2016 as a sign of protest to bring attention to the police brutality and racial inequality that Black men and women face in their daily lives.

results.actual_text: The Friday night lights of Texas high school football have taken on a mythical quality over the
results.plain_text: The Friday night lights of Texas high school football have taken on a mythical quality over the years, but Thursdays have a storied history of their own. Author Michael Hurd will take part in a live virtual event for the Allen Public Library to discuss the largely unknown history of Black high school football in the state. Hurd’s Thursday Night Lights: The Story of Black High School Football in Texas was named one of the 30 best Texas books for the 2010-19 decade by The Texas Observer and one of the 30 most essential books about Texas by the Houston Chronicle. The live event will be at 7:30 p.m. May 13 at allentx.swagit.com. Former Dallas Morning News columnist James Ragland will moderate the program. Former Dallas Cowboys receiver Tony Hill will also take part. Thursday Night Lights tells the inspiring story of Black high school football in Texas from 1920 to 1970. The segregated high schools in the Prairie View Interscholastic League (the Black counterpart to the University Interscholastic League) included future NFL greats such as “Mean” Joe Greene, Otis Taylor and Charles “Bubba” Smith, who appeared in six Police Academy movies after his All-Pro career. Hurd is also the author of Black College Football, 1892-1992, the only book that comprehensively documents the legacies of football programs at historically Black colleges, and he serves on the selection committee for the Black College Football Hall of Fame. He is a board member for the Writers’ League of Texas, a trustee with the Friends of the Texas Historical Commission and a member of the Texas Institute of Letters. For details about the virtual event, call 214-509-4911.

Author Michael Hurd will take part in a live virtual event for the Allen Public Library to discuss the largely unknown history of Black high school football in the state.
